Utterances.Utterance: What payment methods do you accept?

ExpectedFlow.Step: Greeting_State (User: What payment methods do you accept?)
Provide_Payment_Methods (Agent: We accept all major credit cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and cash for dine-in or pickup.)
Ask_Specific_Method (User: Do you accept PayPal for online orders?)
Confirm_Specific_Method (Agent: Yes, we accept PayPal for orders placed through our website and app.)
Disconnect_State (Agent: Let me know if you need help placing an order!)

Utterances.Utterance: How many points do I have in my rewards account?

ExpectedFlow.Step: Greeting_State (User: How many points do I have in my rewards account?)
Ask_Identifier (Agent: I can look that up. What is the phone number associated with your account?)
Provide_Identifier (User: It's 555-9876.)
Check_Rewards_State
Provide_Points (Agent: You currently have 1200 points, which is enough for a free appetizer on your next visit!)
Goodbye_State (User: Oh nice! Thank you.)
Disconnect_State (Agent: You're welcome. See you soon!)

Utterances.Utterance: I have a promo code I want to use.

ExpectedFlow.Step: Greeting_State (User: I have a promo code I want to use.)
Ask_Code (Agent: I can apply that for you. What is the promo code?)
Provide_Code (User: The code is SAVE20.)
Validate_Code_State
Confirm_Discount (Agent: Code SAVE20 has been applied successfully. You've received 20% off your order total.)
Disconnect_State (Agent: Perfect! Proceed to checkout whenever you are ready.)

Utterances.Utterance: I need a refund for an incorrect charge.

ExpectedFlow.Step: Greeting_State (User: I need a refund for an incorrect charge.)
Ask_Order_Number (Agent: I can look into that. What is the order number and the amount in question?)
Provide_Details (User: Order number is 1122 and I was charged twice for the drinks.)
Verify_Charge_State
Confirm_Refund (Agent: I see the duplicate charge. I have initiated a refund for the extra amount. It should appear on your statement in 3-5 days.)
Goodbye_State (User: Thank you for sorting that out.)
Disconnect_State (Agent: You're welcome. Have a great day.)
